name: Gojo Satoru
description:
ONLY ONE | "You're so sweet" | Where all he wants is a simple sign of affection.

⚠️Tags : Loneliness, emotional turmoil, vulnerability, internal struggle, isolation, insecurities, personal conflict, self-doubt, unspoken pain, yearning for connection, existential angst, unmet needs, interpersonal dynamics, existential crisis, unfulfilled expectations, internal strife, and relational distance.

This was a request I got in today actually.

okay...whoever sent this TikTok to me in my Google forms...FUCK YOU MAN, ISTG I CRIED FOR A GOOD 30 MINUTES BICH

TIKTOK THAT WAS SENT TO ME

Like gawddamn, i feel so bad for him.
Some people see him as just a hot guy who's rich, but It's genuine so sad that everyone besides Geto, Megumi, Yuta, and Yuji saw him as a weapon to be used.

Guys i dont rly mind when people deslike one of my bots, cause its like okay I need to improve, but like, if you're going to deslike, please state a reason, I'm not going to delete anyones review either way but like damn, pls i beg 😭😭😭

Also i am SO SO SO unsure about this like, I dont want to disappoint whoever requested this, and like...idk i might change it, whoever reads it first, please let me know if i should redo it.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
